title: yaphah #3302
definition:
1) to be bright, be beautiful, be handsome, be fair
    1a) (Qal) to be beautiful
    1b) (Piel) to beautify
    1c) (Pual) to be beautiful
    1d) (Hithpael) to beautify oneself
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) to be bright, be beautiful, be handsome, be fair
    1a) (Qal) to be beautiful
    1b) (Piel) to beautify
    1c) (Pual) to be beautiful
    1d) (Hithpael) to beautify oneself

    NASB:  to be fair or beautiful
